raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.4": 4, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the load-bearing concept (cross-viewpoint generalization vs. homography augmentation) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names several prior works and articulates the delta between the claimed contribution and actual evidence.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for multiple claims, including the novelty of the method and the generalization to real-world deployment scenarios.",
    "RX.3": "Maps against relevant prior work (domain-randomization, test-time adaptation) and identifies a sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.4": "Identifies potential downstream harms such as overclaiming on cross-viewpoint robustness and missing experiments that would validate the claims.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept (cross-viewpoint generalization vs. homography augmentation) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names several prior works and articulates the delta between the claimed contribution and actual evidence.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for multiple claims, including the novelty of the method and the generalization to real-world deployment scenarios.
rationale.RX.3: Maps against relevant prior work (domain-randomization, test-time adaptation) and identifies a sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential downstream harms such as overclaiming on cross-viewpoint robustness and missing experiments that would validate the claims.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
